question_en: When does the semester start?
answer_en: The semester usually starts in September for the autumn intake.

question_en: How do I apply for admission?
answer_en: You can apply through the university online application portal.

question_en: What documents are required for admission?
answer_en: Typically a passport transcripts and English proficiency proof are required.

question_en: How long does the admission process take?
answer_en: The admission process usually takes 2 to 6 weeks.

question_en: How do I apply for student accommodation?
answer_en: Apply through the university housing portal after receiving an offer.

question_en: Can I change my accommodation later?
answer_en: Yes you can request a room change depending on availability.

question_en: Are utility bills included in accommodation fees?
answer_en: Most university accommodations include basic utilities.

question_en: How do I pay my tuition fees?
answer_en: Tuition fees can be paid via the student portal using card or bank transfer.

question_en: When is the tuition fee deadline?
answer_en: The deadline is usually before the start of the semester.

question_en: Are there installment payment options?
answer_en: Yes installment plans may be available upon request.

question_en: Do I need a student visa?
answer_en: International students usually require a valid student visa.

question_en: Where can I get visa support?
answer_en: Contact the international student support office for guidance.

question_en: What is a BRP card?
answer_en: A BRP is a biometric residence permit issued to international students.

question_en: Where can I see my timetable?
answer_en: Your timetable is available on the student portal.

question_en: What if my classes overlap?
answer_en: Contact your course administrator to resolve timetable clashes.

question_en: How do I register for modules?
answer_en: Module registration is completed through the student portal.

question_en: What happens if I miss registration?
answer_en: Contact the academic office immediately for assistance.

question_en: When are exam dates announced?
answer_en: Exam dates are usually published mid semester.

question_en: How do I apply for extenuating circumstances?
answer_en: Submit the official form with supporting evidence.

question_en: Where is the library located?
answer_en: The main library is located in the central campus building.

question_en: How do I access online library resources?
answer_en: Log in to the library website using your student credentials.

question_en: How do I connect to campus WiFi?
answer_en: Select the university WiFi network and log in with your student ID.

question_en: My student portal password is not working what should I do?
answer_en: Use the password reset option or contact IT support.

question_en: How can I contact student support services?
answer_en: You can contact them via email or visit the student services office.

question_en: Are counseling services available?
answer_en: Yes free counseling services are available for students.

question_en: How do I apply for scholarships?
answer_en: Scholarship applications are available on the university website.

question_en: When are scholarship results announced?
answer_en: Scholarship results are typically announced before semester start.

question_en: How do I get my student ID card?
answer_en: Student ID cards are issued after enrolment.

question_en: I lost my student ID how do I replace it?
answer_en: Request a replacement through the student portal and pay the fee if required.

question_en: Where can I find part time job opportunities?
answer_en: Check the university career portal and notice boards.

question_en: Does the university offer internship support?
answer_en: Yes the career center provides internship guidance.

question_en: How do I join student clubs?
answer_en: Join clubs through the student activities portal.

question_en: Are sports facilities available?
answer_en: Yes sports facilities are available for all enrolled students.

question_en: How do I request academic transcripts?
answer_en: Submit a transcript request form via the student portal.

question_en: How do I defer my studies?
answer_en: Contact the admissions or academic office to apply for deferral.

question_en: What is the grading system?
answer_en: The grading system is explained in the academic handbook.

question_en: How do I update my contact details?
answer_en: Update your details through the student portal profile section.

question_en: Can I change my course after enrollment?
answer_en: Course changes may be possible with academic approval.

question_en: Where can I find campus maps?
answer_en: Campus maps are available on the university website.

question_en: How do I attend orientation sessions?
answer_en: Orientation schedules are emailed before the semester begins.
